calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-11-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day having been assigned by Department 206 for Small Claims Appeal.
Dept: 611; Judge: Lynn O'Malley; Clerk: Kevin Dougherty; CSR: Proceedings Not Reported.
The Court hears this matter as trial de novo.

Respondent Kristen Ratan was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.
Respondent Suneel Ratan was not present at today's hearing.
Appellant Rania Shweb was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.

The following exhibits were marked for identification by Respondent Kristen Ratan and admitted into evidence:

Respondent's Exhibit 1: Copy of undated letter from Rania Shweb to Kristen & Suneel. Nine pages with attachments;
Respondent's Exhibit 2: Copy of email from Chad to Kristen Ratan regarding quote dated 4/5/16. One page;
Respondent's Exhibit 3: Five color photographs of the cabinents & stove-back at the subject property located at 1123 Carolina Street, San Francisco, CA dated 8/31/15;
Respondent's Exhibit 4: Copy of email exchange between Kristen Raten & Alex Powers regarding quotes for repair work at 1123 Carolina Street, San Francisco, CA dated 4/6/16;
Respondent's Exhibit 5: Copy of one page letter from Laurel Collier to Sir/Madam regarding a fountain at was allegedly on the property at 1123 Carolina Stree, San Francisco, CA dated 2/1/16; and
Respondent's Exhibit 6: Copy of email exchange between Kristen Ratan & Suneel Ratan and Rani Shweb date 5/26/15. Three pages.

Appellant Rania Shweb submitted her entire personal case file to the Court for review.

At the conclusion of the parties' respective presentations, the Court takes the matter under SUBMISSION and shall issue a ruling forwith. Exhibits are retained by the Court.
